Title: AgentRun for Umbraco
Description: AI-powered workflow engine for Umbraco. Define multi-step agent workflows in YAML and run them from the backoffice. Ships with three ready-to-run examples: Umbraco Content Audit (analyses your site's content tree), Content Quality Audit (scores any public URL), and Accessibility Quick-Scan (WCAG 2.1 AA findings). Extensible tool system — add custom tools for your editorial workflows. Apache 2.0 licensed, built on Umbraco.AI.

AuthorDetails.Name: Adam Shallcross
AuthorDetails.Description: CEO & Founder at Cogworks. Umbraco advocate, interested in how humans and AI can work together in harmony.
